docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, QUINN B. AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, ROSARIO B. HILL, PAUL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HILL, ROSARIO B. HILL, PAUL
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PICARDO, RAUL SABARRE SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GONZALES, QUINN B.
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, QUINN B. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-12-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; DIANA PADILLA/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. 10:15AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL RAUL PICARDO, DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HILL, ROSARIO B. HILL, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 714 - 9TH AVE, S.F., STAYED UNTIL DEC-15-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WVS RENT IF DEFTS VACATE BY 12/15/97. PLTF RETURNED $900 XHEXK FOR SEPT RENT TO DEFTS IN COURT. BY 12/5/97 PLTF TO RETURN $1,125- TO DEFTS ($800- LAST MONTH'S RENT + $250- SECURITY DEPOSIT + $75- INTEREST). IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE DEFTS TO PAY RENT FOR SEP,OCT,NOV, DEC 1 THRU 14 + PER DIEM.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
